flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at William Woods University fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (69.0% → 58.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at William Woods University fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (55.0% → 46.8%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at William Woods University rose 14% between 2006 and 2009 ($15.2k → $17.3k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at William Woods University fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (49.5% → 42.5%).
